calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order to waive appearance of witness at prove-up hearing is on file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Jarrett's A1 Transmission Inc., Kevin P. Jarrett and Deanna Jarrett as follows:
Damages/Principal $27,695.83
Prejudgment Interest $523.71
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $435.00, for a total of $31,154.54.
The court further orders that Plaintiff is entitled to possession of a leased equipment, and upon sale thereof, defendant shall receive credit. (see scanned document for details)
Judgment signed in open court.
